query:
-- Fix Zambrero Fremantle service link
UPDATE octane_customer_links 
SET matchType = 'name_match', matchConfidence = 88.00, 
    internalCustomerExternalId = 'C0340', internalCustomerName = 'Zambrero Fremantle',
    matchNotes = 'Matched to Zambrero Fremantle (C0340, Nivanu Pty Ltd) by location name'
WHERE octaneCustomerId = '528133' AND octaneServiceName = 'Zam Fremantle 4G';

-- Fix Mother Duck Bracken Ridge
UPDATE octane_customer_links 
SET matchType = 'name_match', matchConfidence = 92.00,
    internalCustomerExternalId = 'C0164', internalCustomerName = 'Mother Duck Bracken Ridge',
    matchNotes = 'Matched to Mother Duck Bracken Ridge (C0164) by name'
WHERE octaneCustomerId = '535123';

-- Fix SmileTel (internal account)
UPDATE octane_customer_links 
SET matchType = 'name_match', matchConfidence = 85.00,
    internalCustomerExternalId = 'C2441', internalCustomerName = 'Smile IT',
    matchNotes = 'Matched to Smile IT (C2441) — SmileTel is the trading name for Smile IT Pty Ltd'
WHERE octaneCustomerId = '526902';

-- Fix Orphan Services - SmileTel (internal orphan container)
UPDATE octane_customer_links 
SET matchType = 'name_match', matchConfidence = 80.00,
    internalCustomerExternalId = 'C2441', internalCustomerName = 'Smile IT',
    matchNotes = 'Orphan Services container mapped to Smile IT (C2441) — internal SmileTel account'
WHERE octaneCustomerId = '525207';

-- Get max customer externalId for new record creation
SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(externalId, 2) AS UNSIGNED)) as maxId FROM customers WHERE externalId LIKE 'C%';
